name: Masquerading via Double File Extension
description: Detects files with double extensions used to disguise malicious executables
query:
// Detect double file extensions used for masquerading
// Trigger on files like document.pdf.exe
events from endpoint
where event_type = "file_write"
  and file_path matches "(?i)\.(pdf|doc|docx|xls|xlsx|jpg|png|txt)\.(exe|scr|bat|cmd|vbs|js|hta|pif|com)$"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
